description: Legal-services vendor procurement: court reporting, records, experts, e-discovery. Live.
name: bid.scope/legal

environmentVariables.description: Bearer token for write operations (scope_dispatch_matter, scope_set_vendor_tier, scope_remove_from_roster). Read-only tools work without it on demo matters.
environmentVariables.name: SCOPE_API_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Override the default Scope API base URL. Defaults to https://scope.bid
environmentVariables.name: SCOPE_API_BASE

environmentVariables.description: Pin reads and writes to a specific buyer org. Useful for multi-tenant Claude deployments.
environmentVariables.name: SCOPE_ORG_SLUG
